reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza el personal del shop. Señoras grandes mirando mal y hablando mal todo por querer dejar un CV. Un asco cero recomendable humor podrido y mal trato

(Translated by Google)
The staff at this shop are a disgrace. Older women giving dirty looks and speaking rudely just because someone wanted to drop off a CV. Disgusting, not recommended at all. Poor humor and bad service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM3eXE2aGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar y me.dijeron "solo efectivo y no te podemos dar factura". Cómoo?? Me van a cobrar lo mismo y no van a facturarlo? Pagan impuestos sobre eso?? Que turbio..... Me fui.

(Translated by Google)
I went to top up my phone and they told me, "Cash only, and we can't give you a receipt." What?! They're going to charge me the same amount and not give me a receipt? Do they pay taxes on that?! How shady... I left.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURiek92WVZnEAE

reviews.comment:

The place is very spacious, and the Full Service has been renovated. The croissants are the best.

reviews.comment:
Pusieron ficha para dar aire a los neumáticos y cuando vas a comprarla te dicen que no tienen más. Son ridículos. Pésimo servicio. ACA tiene que tomar medidas a favor del cliente

(Translated by Google)
They put out a token to inflate the tires, and when you go to buy more, they tell you they're out. It's ridiculous. Terrible service. ACA needs to take action to protect its customers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyN18tZ0tnEAE

reviews.comment:
La atención pésima. Quería comprar una bolsa de hielo y nadie en la playa podía ayudarme. Me decían que tenía que buscar al encargado pero el encargado no aparecía por ningún lado. Cuando finalmente apareció abrió la heladera con el hielo que estaba asquerosa y el hielo todo hecho un solo bloque de hielo. Muy mala la atención del encargado y personal de la playa. Además compré dos café y estaban asquerosos. Quedamos y aguados. La peor YPF que he ido

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible. I wanted to buy a bag of ice, and no one on the beach could help me. They kept telling me I had to find the manager, but he was nowhere to be seen. When he finally appeared, he opened the cooler, and the ice was disgusting, all frozen into one solid block. The manager and the beach staff were awful. I also bought two coffees, and they were disgusting. We were sore and watered down. The worst YPF I've ever been to.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyci1uUG1RRRAB
